tweets.text:
STARTUP PROFILE: Jedify
• HQ: New York
• Founded: ~2024
• Total raised: $33M+
• Product: Context graphs via "Semantic Fusion" — automated semantic models combining structured + unstructured enterprise data
• Key tech: Patent-pending. Model-agnostic. Real-time updates.
tweets.name: Nik
